messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi there! I just got my order and, well, I’m a bit confused. The hiking boots I received look like someone already took them for a hike before me! I’d really like a fresh, new pair with the same specs, please. Also, I got a jigsaw puzzle, but I think I want to swap it for one with a fancier theme and about 500 pieces less, but I still want it to be just as challenging. Can you help me with both of these?

message.content: Hi there! I just got my order and, well, I’m a bit confused. The hiking boots I received look like someone already took them for a hike before me! I’d really like a fresh, new pair with the same specs, please. Also, I got a jigsaw puzzle, but I think I want to swap it for one with a fancier theme and about 500 pieces less, but I still want it to be just as challenging. Can you help me with both of these?

messages.content: okay. can i hvae your first name ,last name and zip?
